case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MARIA INES FERNANDEZ JUAREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-28-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY JHANATTAN HERRADA COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MARIA INEX FERNANDEZ JUAREZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00- SERVED OCT-11-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JUAREZ, MARIA INES FERNANDEZ
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JUAREZ, MARIA INES FERNANDEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
